subject: Update oom master to pick up 5.0.1 nbi release
commit_message:
Update oom master to pick up 5.0.1 nbi release

Change-Id: I5f9292c70b0f31a615a7d4c84222ce08b8c99de1
Issue-ID: EXTAPI-314
Signed-off-by: aosull01 <adrian.osullivan@huawei.com>

entries.message:

bumping oom master to pick up NBI El Alto 5.0.1 release docker
